infrastructure.title: Infrastructure Status
infrastructure.body:
# Infrastructure Status

## Overall Health
HEALTHY

Weekend mode — markets closed Saturday. All 10 collectors enabled and operational. Task execution confirmed active today (fitness values evolving for `[[task/b4a94bf2]]`). No live portfolio models deployed. Single broker (Alpaca Paper) correctly configured.

## Collectors

model-rankings.title: Model Rankings
model-rankings.body:
# Model Rankings

## 🚨 HEADLINE: fc3af3fc Sole Leader at 2/5 — Issue #134 Reveals since_created $0 Net Profit

`[[model/fc3af3fc]]` remains the sole multi-horizon-qualified pipeline candidate at 2/5 consecutive 16w ≥0.80. All thresholds pass (16w=0.8150, 8w=0.6825, 4w=0.8272, IS DD 9.51%).

**Issue #134 Flag:** since_created horizon reveals fc3af3fc has **$0 net profit** and **cecpp -0.856** in its 2 days of life (created Mar 12). All 16w performance comes from older data. Not yet disqualifying (2 days too short per proposed 7-day gate) but warrants a new promotion gate.

**New model spotlight:** `[[model/541bca38]]` (EXP-22) debuted today with optimizer 0.823, IS DD 8.65%, IS cecpp 0.901 — strong fundamentals. First 16w eval pending.

## Ready for Promotion
| Rank | Model | Task | Score | Sharpe | MaxDD | Expectancy | Ops | cecpp | Backtest | Recommendation |
|------|-------|------|-------|--------|-------|------------|-----|-------|----------|----------------|
| *(none)* | — | — | — | — | — | — | — | — | — | No model at 5/5 consecutive yet |

## Pipeline — Full Multi-Horizon Qualified

### Sole Leader: `[[model/fc3af3fc]]` 🏆 (`[[task/8b877f86]]` EXP-21) — 2/5

| Horizon | Score | Prev | Delta | Threshold | Status |
|---------|-------|------|-------|-----------|--------|
| **16w** | **0.8150** | 0.8096 | +0.54pp | ≥0.80 | ✅ (2/5 consecutive) |
| **8w** | **0.6825** | 0.7691 | -8.66pp | ≥0.60 | ✅ (8.3pp headroom) |
| **4w** | **0.8272** | 0.6027 | +22.4pp | ≥0.40 | ✅ |
| **1w** | **0.1223** | — | — | info | 2 ops (open, no closures) |
| **since_created** | **0.1336** | 0.1182 | +1.5pp | proposed ≥0.20 @ 7d | ⚠️ cecpp=-0.856, $0 net |
| **IS DD** | **9.51%** | — | — | <15% | ✅ (5.5pp headroom) |

**16w Full Stats:** cecpp=0.893, sharpe=10.58, sortino=15.43, DD=12.11%, 46 ops, exp=$25.39, net=$913.92, ret%=6.26%

**Path to promotion:** 3 more consecutive 16w ≥0.80 (Mar 15, 16, 17). Earliest: **Mar 18**.
**Key risk:** since_created shows $0 net profit in 2 days of life. If still $0 by Mar 18 (6 days), recommend BLOCKING promotion until resolved.

---

### Near-Pipeline: `[[model/99f035df]]` (`[[task/eb1b1e97]]` EXP-20) — Counter Reset 0/5

| Horizon | Score | Threshold | Status |
|---------|-------|-----------|--------|
| **16w** | **0.7999836** | ≥0.80 | ❌ (below by 0.00016!) |
| **8w** | **0.6042** | ≥0.60 | ✅ (0.4pp headroom — marginal) |
| **4w** | **0.8095** | ≥0.40 | ✅ |
| **IS DD** | **7.97%** | <15% | ✅⭐ (best in pipeline) |

**16w Stats:** cecpp=0.880, sharpe=8.43, DD=9.31%, 48 ops, exp=$24.03, net=$913.07
**16w History:** 0.7902 → 0.8035 → 0.7999 (oscillating at boundary)
**Assessment:** NOT terminal. Model healthy across all short horizons. Just can't hold 0.80 consistently. Likely to re-cross next cycle. Earliest promotion: **Mar 19**.

---

## Monitoring (Promising)

| Model | Task | 16w | 8w | 4w | IS DD | Evals | Status |
|-------|------|-----|-----|-----|-------|-------|--------|
| `[[model/374cdefc]]` | `[[task/03255fc1]]` EXP-23 | **0.8390** | 0.6698 ✅ | **0.1600** ❌ | **14.07%** ⚠️ | 1 | 4w dead. IS DD borderline. Strong debut but multi-hz fail. |
| `[[model/26cc4684]]` | `[[task/6e88f1c6]]` EXP-26 | **0.9449*** | **0.7579*** | **0.7827*** | **9.09%** ✅ | 1 | *Recalibrated scorer. Threshold 0.90. Multi-hz strong. 19 ops in 4w. |
| `[[model/7376e292]]` ⚠️ | `[[task/eb61f98b]]` EXP-22 | **0.8132** ↓ | **0.5893** ❌ | 0.7245 | 10.63% ✅ | 2 | 8w collapsed. Recovery expected ~Mar 20. |
| `[[model/541bca38]]` 🆕 | `[[task/eb61f98b]]` EXP-22 | pending | pending | pending | **8.65%** ✅ | 0 | Optimizer 0.823. IS cecpp 0.901, sharpe 7.13. First eval pending. |
| `[[model/1a591c87]]` 🔍 | `[[task/eb1b1e97]]` EXP-20 | **0.7505** | **0.7211** ✅⭐ | **0.7103** ✅⭐ | **7.97%** ✅ | 1 | **Best 8w (0.721) among unblocked models.** IS cecpp 0.589 ⚠️. |

### Notable: `[[model/1a591c87]]` Multi-Horizon Profile

This model has the strongest 8w and 4w scores of ANY non-IS-DD-blocked GLD model:
- 16w: 0.751 (below threshold, but 16w cecpp=0.878, sharpe=8.30, 36 ops)
- 8w: **0.721** (best among non-blocked; fc3af3fc=0.683, 99f035df=0.604)
- 4w: **0.710** (strong; fc3af3fc=0.827 but that's a window artifact)
- IS DD: 7.97% ✅ (excellent headroom)
- **BUT:** IS cecpp=0.589 (below 0.60 quality warning) and since_created shows $0 net profit
- Only 1 eval — too early to classify. Watch closely.

---

## Degrading (Action Needed)

| Model | Task | 16w | 16w Trend | 8w | 4w | Live? | Recommendation |
|-------|------|-----|-----------|-----|-----|-------|----------------|
| `[[model/54b33aea]]` 💀 | `[[task/1d615d47]]` EXP-14 | **0.8114** | ↓↓ 0.831→0.811 (-2.0pp) | 0.4815 ❌ | 0.3576 ❌ | No | **TERMINAL.** ALL horizons declining for first time. 16w finally breaking. |

---

## IS DD Blocked (Permanently)

| Model | Task | 16w | IS DD | Key Stats |
|-------|------|-----|-------|-----------|
| `[[model/4fc2c04e]]` | `[[task/a72da2ed]]` EXP-11 | 0.857 | **18.35%** ❌ | cecpp 0.966, sharpe 15.42. Best raw quality. Reference standard. |
| `[[model/50c0ac0b]]` | `[[task/1d615d47]]` EXP-14 | 0.833 | **19.27%** ❌ | |
| `[[model/0552fd0c]]` | `[[task/583f4d4b]]` EXP-27 | 0.848* | **27.51%** ❌ | XLE structural. Task DISABLED. |

---

## Held (Below Threshold or Multi-Hz Fail)

| Model | Task | 16w | Blocker | IS DD |
|-------|------|-----|---------|-------|
| `[[model/405ef2d1]]` | `[[task/8ee183d8]]` EXP-25 | 0.7999 | 8w=0.4746 ❌ | 9.09% ✅ |
| `[[model/198d0c1f]]` | `[[task/32062f72]]` EXP-15 | ~0.803 | 8w=0.413 ❌, 4w dead | 13.38% ✅ |
| `[[model/7f7ac2e4]]` | `[[task/a72da2ed]]` EXP-11 | ~0.810 | 8w=0.590 ❌ | 14.03% ⚠️ |

---

## Emerging Models

| Model | Task | 16w | Trend | IS DD | Notes |
|-------|------|-----|-------|-------|-------|
| `[[model/fd60312c]]` | `[[task/e3017490]]` EXP-17 | 0.744 ↓ | -2.1pp | **8.34%** ⭐⭐ | First decline. Lowest IS DD in platform. |
| `[[model/001b9ef2]]` | `[[task/eb1b1e97]]` EXP-20 | 0.743 ↓ | -1.0pp | **8.93%** ⭐ | Declining. |
| `[[model/f601bbb5]]` | `[[task/eb61f98b]]` EXP-22 | 0.721 ↓ | -1.0pp | **8.93%** ⭐ | Declining. |
| `[[model/2d5307c8]]` | `[[task/8b877f86]]` EXP-21 | 0.689 ↓ | -1.9pp | **9.79%** ✅ | Declining. |

**ALL emerging GLD models declined this cycle.** Systemic 16w impact from GLD regime shift.

---

## New Models Today (Mar 14)

| Model | Task | Optimizer Score | IS DD | Assessment |
|-------|------|----------------|-------|------------|
| `[[model/541bca38]]` ⭐ | `[[task/eb61f98b]]` EXP-22 | **0.823** | **8.65%** ✅ | Strong. IS cecpp 0.901. First eval pending. |
| `[[model/d763df9d]]` | `[[task/eb1b1e97]]` EXP-20 | **0.781** | TBD | New EXP-20 model. |
| `[[model/aee99e33]]` | `[[task/880c9eb3]]` EXP-16 | **0.783** | TBD | XLE. Strong for XLE standard. |
| `[[model/2fef2d9a]]` | `[[task/ff4e370b]]` EXP-28 | **0.503** | TBD | EXP-28 improving (prev was 0.075). |
| `[[model/8dd2fec7]]` | `[[task/ff4e370b]]` EXP-28 | **0.337** | TBD | EXP-28 early. |
| `[[model/884c0e1e]]` | `[[task/880c9eb3]]` EXP-16 | 0.655 | TBD | XLE. |
| Others | EXP-18/24 | 0.31-0.62 | TBD | Walk-forward / XLE early models. |

---

## Issue #134 Analysis: since_created vs 16w Divergence

| Model | 16w Score | since_created Score | since_created cecpp | Net Profit (SC) | Days Alive |
|-------|-----------|--------------------|--------------------|-----------------|------------|
| `[[model/fc3af3fc]]` | **0.8150** | **0.1336** | **-0.856** | **$0** | 2 |
| `[[model/1a591c87]]` | 0.7505 | — | **-0.916** | **$0** | 1 |

**Root cause:** GLD declined ~3% since these models were created. Models opened positions into the decline; no positions have closed.

**Proposed additional promotion gate:**
1. `since_created` score ≥ 0.20 after 7+ days of life
2. `since_created` net_profit ≥ $0 after 7+ days
3. If fc3af3fc reaches 5/5 on 16w but fails since_created gate, **HOLD promotion** until gate clears

This is structural to GLD in the current regime — not model-specific.

---

## Summary
- **Total models:** 100
- **Above promotion threshold (16w ≥0.80):** 8 (only 1 passes multi-hz)
- **Pipeline candidates:** 1 (`[[model/fc3af3fc]]` at 2/5)
- **Near-pipeline:** 1 (`[[model/99f035df]]` oscillating)
- **Newly promoted:** 0
- **Degrading flagged:** 1 (`[[model/54b33aea]]` TERMINAL)
- **Notable new:** `[[model/541bca38]]` (IS DD 8.65%, IS cecpp 0.901)
- **Systemic:** ALL emerging GLD models declined on 16w

## Promotion Timeline

| Scenario | Model | Earliest | Probability | Key Dependency |
|----------|-------|----------|-------------|----------------|
| fc3af3fc sustains | `[[model/fc3af3fc]]` | **Mar 18** | **25%** ↓ | 3 more ≥0.80 + 8w holds + since_created gate |
| 99f035df re-crosses | `[[model/99f035df]]` | **Mar 19** | **15%** | Re-cross 0.80 + 5 consecutive |
| 541bca38 enters pipeline | `[[model/541bca38]]` | **Mar 19** | **10%** | Needs first 16w ≥0.80 + multi-hz |
| EXP-30 produces model | New | **Mar 20+** | **15%** | Scale-up of EXP-21 |
| No promotion by Mar 20 | — | — | **27%** ↑ | since_created gate + GLD regime |

portfolio-status.body:
# Portfolio Status

## Portfolios
| Portfolio | Models (enabled/total) | Total Allocation | Broker |
|-----------|----------------------|------------------|--------|
| `[[portfolio/paper-alpha-01]]` (447e2d45) | 0/0 | 0% | `[[broker/Alpaca Paper]]` (ed622468) |

## Active Models
| Portfolio | Model | Allocation | Enabled Since | Score | Sharpe | MaxDD | Expectancy | Orders (24h) | Status |
|-----------|-------|------------|---------------|-------|--------|-------|------------|--------------|--------|
| *(none deployed)* | — | — | — | — | — | — | — | — | Portfolio empty |

## Pipeline — Multi-Horizon Ranking (Mar 14)

### Sole Leader — Full Multi-Horizon Qualified
| Model | Task | 16w | 8w | 4w | IS DD | Consec ≥0.80 | ETA |
|-------|------|-----|-----|-----|-------|-------------|-----|
| `[[model/fc3af3fc]]` 🏆 | EXP-21 | **0.8150** (+0.54pp) | **0.6825** ✅ | **0.8272** ✅ | 9.51% ✅ | **2/5** | **Mar 18** |

### Setback — Oscillating at Threshold
| Model | Task | 16w | 8w | 4w | IS DD | Consec ≥0.80 | Issue |
|-------|------|-----|-----|-----|-------|-------------|-------|
| `[[model/99f035df]]` | EXP-20 | **0.7999** (-0.35pp) | 0.6042 ✅ | 0.8095 ✅ | 7.97% ✅ | **0/5** (reset) | Exact 16w = 0.79998, below 0.80 by 0.0002. Counter reset. |

### Held — Multi-Horizon Failure
| Model | Task | 16w | 8w | 4w | Consec ≥0.80 | Blocker |
|-------|------|-----|-----|-----|-------------|---------|
| `[[model/7376e292]]` ⚠️ | EXP-22 | **0.8132** | **0.5893** ❌ | 0.7245 ✅ | 2/5 (16w only) | 8w collapsed -13pp. First-eval inflation confirmed. |
| `[[model/54b33aea]]` 💀 | EXP-14 | 0.8114 (-1.97pp) | **0.4815** ❌ | 0.3576 ❌ | 6/6 (16w) | TERMINAL. ALL horizons now declining. |
| `[[model/198d0c1f]]` | EXP-15 | ~0.80 | 0.413 ❌ | 0.063 ❌ | 2/5 | 4w/8w near-dead |
| `[[model/7f7ac2e4]]` | EXP-11 | ~0.80 | 0.590 ❌ | 0.184 ❌ | 1/5 | IS DD 14.03% borderline + multi-hz fail |

### IS DD Blocked (Permanently)
| Model | Task | 16w | IS DD |
|-------|------|-----|-------|
| `[[model/4fc2c04e]]` | EXP-11 | 0.856 | 18.35% ❌ |
| `[[model/50c0ac0b]]` | EXP-14 | 0.813 | 19.27% ❌ |

### Emerging Safety Track
| Model | Task | 16w | Δ | Trend | IS DD | Note |
|-------|------|-----|---|-------|-------|------|
| `[[model/fd60312c]]` | EXP-17 | 0.744 | -2.1pp ⚠️ | **First decline** | 8.34% ⭐ | Was climbing 3 straight. Systemic 8w-window effect? |
| `[[model/001b9ef2]]` | EXP-20 | ~0.753 | — | Climbing | 8.93% ⭐ | Analyst flagged as decelerating |
| `[[model/f601bbb5]]` | EXP-22 | ~0.731 | — | Climbing | 8.93% ⭐ | 4w near-dead though |
| `[[model/2d5307c8]]` | EXP-21 | ~0.708 | — | Stalled | 9.79% ✅ | Multi-horizon quality OK |

## Recent Changes
| Date | Portfolio | Model | Action | Reason |
|------|-----------|-------|--------|--------|
| 2026-03-14 | — | `[[model/fc3af3fc]]` | **Advanced to 2/5** | 16w eval 2: 0.8150 (+0.54pp). All multi-horizon criteria pass. Sole pipeline leader. |
| 2026-03-14 | — | `[[model/99f035df]]` | **Counter reset 0/5** | 16w eval 3: 0.79998 — below 0.80 threshold. Consecutive counter reset. |
| 2026-03-14 | — | `[[model/7376e292]]` | **Reclassified HELD** | 8w collapsed 0.719→0.589 (-13pp). Fails multi-horizon 8w ≥0.60 threshold. |
| 2026-03-14 | — | `[[model/54b33aea]]` | **TERMINAL confirmed** | 16w dropped to 0.811 (-1.97pp). 8w at 0.482. All horizons declining for the first time. |
| 2026-03-14 | — | `[[model/fd60312c]]` | First 16w decline | 0.765→0.744 (-2.1pp). Emerging track interrupted. |

## Capacity
- Available allocation headroom: 100% ($40,000 equity)
- Models pending promotion: 1 (`[[model/fc3af3fc]]` at 2/5 — earliest Mar 18)
- Models recovering near threshold: 1 (`[[model/99f035df]]` at 0/5 — may re-cross 0.80)
- Pipeline depth: 1 qualified, 1 near-threshold, 4 held, 4 emerging

## Systemic Note: Rolling Window Shift (Mar 14)
ALL GLD models showed identical pattern this eval cycle: **8w declined, 4w spiked**. This is a rolling-window artifact — a bad data period from ~6-8 weeks ago is still within the 8w window (depressing scores) but has rolled out of the 4w window (causing 4w to surge). fc3af3fc's 8w resilience (0.683 vs 0.589 for 7376e292) confirms its superior regime adaptability. By next week, the bad data should age out of the 8w window too.

task-performance.title: Task Performance Report
task-performance.body:
# Task Performance Report

## 🚨 HEADLINE: Pipeline CRITICAL — fc3af3fc Sole Survivor. Created EXP-29 & EXP-30 to Deepen Pipeline. Disabled EXP-15 & EXP-27.

**The pipeline narrowed from 3→1.** Only `[[model/fc3af3fc]]` (EXP-21) passes full multi-horizon validation at 2/5 consecutive. `[[model/99f035df]]` fell below 0.80 by 0.0002 (counter reset 0/5). `[[model/7376e292]]` 8w collapsed to 0.589. The systemic GLD regime shift is now impacting 16w evaluations across ALL emerging models.

**Response:** Created 2 new experiments targeting pipeline depth:
- **EXP-29** (`[[task/39e44ad8]]`): Recalibrated scorer + subgraph crossover on GLD — novel topology search with better-calibrated fitness.
- **EXP-30** (`[[task/f29a02cc]]`): DD-weighted scorer + pop=300 on GLD — scale-up of the proven best task (EXP-21).

**Freed compute:** Disabled EXP-15 (8w/4w dead) and EXP-27 (XLE IS DD >26% structural).

**Issue #134 noted:** Human raised scorer gap — `virtual_profit` not used in any scorer. fc3af3fc has -$182 unrealized losses on 7 open positions. Monitoring for experimental response.

## Top Performing Tasks
| Task | Type | Best 16w Score | Avg Sharpe | Avg MaxDD | Avg Ops | Best Model | Models Produced | Notes |
|------|------|-----------|------------|-----------|---------|------------|-----------------|-------|
| `[[task/8b877f86]]` EXP-21 | graph/GLD DD-weighted | **0.8150** | 10.58 | 12.11% | 46 | `[[model/fc3af3fc]]` (2/5) 🏆 | 6 | SOLE pipeline leader. 4w cecpp 0.436 best. |
| `[[task/eb61f98b]]` EXP-22 | graph/GLD subgraph-xover | **0.8132** | 8.85 | 8.72% | 58 | `[[model/7376e292]]` (2/5 16w-only) | 5 | ⚠️ 8w collapsed to 0.589. Multi-hz fail. |
| `[[task/03255fc1]]` EXP-23 | graph/GLD cecpp scorer | **0.8390** | 8.63 | 9.21% | 44 | `[[model/374cdefc]]` (debut!) | 4+ | 🆕 Surprise 0.839 debut. 4w dead (0 ops). IS DD 14.07% borderline. |
| `[[task/eb1b1e97]]` EXP-20 | graph/GLD pop=300 | **0.7999** | 8.43 | 9.31% | 48 | `[[model/99f035df]]` (0/5 reset) | 3 | Fell below 0.80 by 0.0002. Oscillating. |
| `[[task/8ee183d8]]` EXP-25 | graph/GLD baseline+subgraph | **0.7999** | 7.97 | 4.75% | 62 | `[[model/405ef2d1]]` | 4 | DD 4.75% RECORD. 8w blocks promotion. |
| `[[task/6e88f1c6]]` EXP-26 | graph/GLD recalibrated | **0.9449*** | 8.48 | 12.35% | 58 | `[[model/26cc4684]]` | 4 | *Score inflated. Equivalent ~0.81 standard. IS DD 9.09% ✅. |
| `[[task/e3017490]]` EXP-17 | graph/GLD baseline+improved | **0.7441** | 7.02 | 10.37% | 61 | `[[model/fd60312c]]` | 2 | IS DD 8.34% ⭐⭐. First decline. |

## Underperforming Tasks
| Task | Type | Avg Score | Common Weakness | Models Produced | Recommendation |
|------|------|-----------|-----------------|-----------------|----------------|
| `[[task/32062f72]]` EXP-15 | graph/GLD NSGA-III | ~0.80 bounce | 8w/4w dead on all models | 5 | **DISABLED Mar 14.** |
| `[[task/583f4d4b]]` EXP-27 | graph/XLE recalibrated | — | IS DD >26% structural | 3 | **DISABLED Mar 14.** |
| `[[task/880c9eb3]]` EXP-16 | graph/XLE tuned | 0.38 | Sigmoid compression + XLE risk | 6 | Keep. Slow but learning. |
| `[[task/8269132d]]` EXP-24 | graph/XLE relaxed | 0.28 | Very early (1 model) | 1 | Keep. Early. |
| `[[task/9ac8eba0]]` EXP-18 | graph/GLD walk-forward | ~0.47 | Not 16w-comparable | 8 | Keep for diversity. |
| `[[task/a72da2ed]]` EXP-11 | graph/GLD tuned | 0.856 | IS DD 18.35% blocks best model | 4 | Reference only. |
| `[[task/b4a94bf2]]` Baseline | graph/ESTC | ~0.54 | Control | 5 | DO NOT MODIFY. |

## Active Experiments
| Task | Hypothesis | Started | Status |
|------|-----------|---------|--------|
| `[[task/39e44ad8]]` **EXP-29** 🆕 | Recalibrated scorer + subgraph crossover finds novel topologies with better fitness calibration | **2026-03-14** | 🆕 Created. First models expected Mar 15-16. |
| `[[task/f29a02cc]]` **EXP-30** 🆕 | DD-weighted scorer + pop=300 scales up proven EXP-21 for pipeline depth | **2026-03-14** | 🆕 Created. First models expected Mar 15-16. |
| `[[task/ff4e370b]]` EXP-28 | Recalibrated + DD-weighted (EXP-26 + EXP-21 hybrid) | 2026-03-14 | First model `[[model/565a4564]]` score 0.075 (very early). |

## Issue #134: virtual_profit Scorer Gap

The human identified that `[[model/fc3af3fc]]` has 7 open losing positions (-$182 virtual_profit) despite scoring 0.815. Current scorers use only `net_profit` (closed trades). `virtual_profit` IS available as a custom-formula variable but no experiment uses it yet.

**Planned response:** Queue virtual_profit-penalized scorer experiment (EXP-31 candidate). Formula prototype:
```
quality_component * smooth_step(virtual_profit / max(net_profit, 0.01), 0.5, 1.0)
```
This would penalize models where open positions erode >50% of realized profit. Deprioritized behind EXP-29/30 since pipeline depth is more urgent.
